agent_summary: Customer reports sending 5000 BDT to an incorrect number (intended 01712345678) via TXN-9101, which was completed to +8801719876543; they request a refund. Evidence confirms the transaction details.
recommended_next_action: Open a dispute investigation for TXN-9101 per wrong_transfer procedure, attempt to contact the recipient for voluntary return, document findings, and if unresolved, escalate to senior dispute team.
customer_reply: We have logged your request regarding TXN-9101 and will investigate the incorrect transfer. Our team will contact the recipient and update you on the outcome. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone

agent_summary: Customer reports sending 2000 BDT to wrong person (TXN-9202) and requests reversal. Evidence shows multiple prior transfers to the same recipient, indicating the claim may be inconsistent.
recommended_next_action: Verify transaction details and recipient history, then open a dispute investigation per policy; if warranted, escalate to the dispute resolution team for possible reversal while adhering to compliance procedures.
customer_reply: We have noted your request regarding TXN-9202. Our team will investigate the transfer and any eligible any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone

customer_reply: We see TXN-9301 failed yet your balance was deducted; we are investigating and any eligible any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone

agent_summary: Customer requests a refund of 500 BDT for TXN-9401 (payment to MERCHANT-7821) after changing mind; evidence shows the transaction is completed.
recommended_next_action: Verify merchant refund policy for TXN-9401, initiate investigation into the refund request, and if eligible process the refund per official procedures; document findings and update ticket.
customer_reply: We have noted your request for TXN-9401. Our team will review the merchant’s refund policy and investigate the request; any eligible any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone

agent_summary: Customer reports receiving a phone call claiming to be from bKash requesting OTP and threatening account blockage; no transaction ID found and evidence is insufficient.
recommended_next_action: Log the phishing attempt, advise the customer on security best practices, and monitor for any related suspicious activity; no further account action required at this time.
customer_reply: The call you received was not from bKash; we never ask for OTP or PIN. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone and ignore such requests. We have logged this incident for further monitoring.

agent_summary: Customer reports an issue with their money but provides no specific transaction; recent cash‑in TXN-9601 (3000 BDT) and transfer TXN-9602 (800 BDT) are shown as completed.
recommended_next_action: Request detailed information about the disputed amount or transaction, verify the account balance, and review recent activity; initiate an investigation if needed per standard procedures.
customer_reply: We’ve noted your concern. Please provide the transaction date, amount, or ID you’re referring to so we can investigate. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

agent_summary: Customer reports cash‑in of 2000 BDT via agent (TXN-9701) not reflected in balance; evidence shows transaction is pending.
recommended_next_action: Verify pending status of TXN-9701, contact the involved agent, and if unresolved within SLA, escalate to agent operations for further investigation.
customer_reply: আপনার ক্যাশ‑ইন (TXN-9701) বর্তমানে পেন্ডিং অবস্থায় আছে। আমরা বিষয়টি যাচাই করছি এবং শীঘ্রই আপডেট দেব। অনুগ্রহ করে কারো সাথে আপনার পিন বা ওটিপি শেয়ার করবেন না।

agent_summary: Customer reports a 1000 BDT transfer to brother not received; transaction history shows two possible completed transfers (TXN-9801, TXN-9802) and one failed (TXN-9803). Evidence insufficient, need clarification.
recommended_next_action: Ask the customer to confirm the recipient phone number or exact transfer time to identify the correct transaction, then verify the transaction details and investigate per dispute_resolution protocol.
customer_reply: We see two completed transfers of 1000 BDT on 2026-04-13. Could you confirm the recipient’s phone number or the time of the transfer? Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone

agent_summary: Merchant reports settlement of 15000 BDT (TXN-9901) not received; system shows the transaction is pending.
recommended_next_action: Verify the pending status of TXN-9901, check processing logs, and if unresolved within SLA, escalate to finance for settlement investigation.
customer_reply: We are reviewing settlement TXN-9901 and will update you shortly. Any eligible any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

agent_summary: Customer reports a single electricity bill payment of 850 BDT but was charged twice; evidence shows duplicate completed transactions TXN-10001 and TXN-10002 for the same amount and biller.
recommended_next_action: Verify the duplicate payments, initiate investigation per duplicate_payment procedure, and if confirmed, process reversal of the extra transaction following refunds policy; document actions in ticket.
customer_reply: We have identified two payments of 850 BDT (TXN-10001 and TXN-10002) for your electricity bill. Our team is reviewing the duplicate and will process any eligible refund through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone
